name: Puzzle Moments
short_description: "Puzzle Moments" is a 2D puzzle casual game.
detailed_description:
• This grid puzzle game is perfect for relaxing during your leisure time. The gameplay is simple and intuitive: move the puzzle pieces based on the reference image on the right, and try to restore it to the complete picture. Each level presents a challenge, but it never feels overwhelming because there is no time limit, allowing you to enjoy the puzzle at a leisurely pace.

  • The game unlocks 30 levels right from the start, and the gradually increasing difficulty along with ever-changing image styles ensure that every time you play, you feel a fresh sense of challenge.

  • With its beautiful interface design and smooth gameplay experience, this game is the ideal choice to unwind and pass the time. Give it a try!

English*, French*, German*, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese*, Korean*
*languages with full audio support
